overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a scenic summer landscape alongside a river. The character travels from a narrow grassy stream through open meadows to a sandy beach, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with wildflowers alongside narrow stream

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy bank of a narrow stream surrounded by wildflowers

entered.detail: calm waterway running parallel to the path with grassy banks
tall green grass and vegetation lining the stream banks
tall purple wildflowers scattered throughout the meadow
bright red poppies dotting the grassy landscape
individual trees with full green canopies spread across the meadow
distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through a lush summer meadow alongside a narrow stream. Tall grass and colorful wildflowers including purple lupines and red poppies fill the foreground, while scattered trees and distant snow-capped mountains frame the horizon under a clear afternoon sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland transitioning to wider riverbank with rocky outcrops

events.description: crossing from narrow stream into wider river landscape with expansive mountain views
walking through shallow water crossing at the stream junction

agents.ego_description: crossing shallow water and continuing along the riverbank toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: rocky shallow crossing where the stream widens
worn earth path cutting through the grassland
clusters of rocks and boulders along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens up as Geralt crosses a shallow rocky section of the stream, transitioning from the enclosed meadow to a wider river valley. A dirt path appears on the right while rocky outcrops line the bank, and the snow-capped mountains become more prominent in the center of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach along wide river with forested opposite shore

events.description: transitioning from grassy bank to sandy beach along the river
walking from sand into shallow river water

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shore and wading into the calm river water

entered.detail: wide sandy shoreline along the river with gentle slope
broad expanse of clear shallow water reflecting the sky
dense green forest covering the opposite bank of the river

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches a sandy beach along the wide river, leaving the tall grass behind. The camera follows as he walks along the shore and wades into the clear shallow water, with a forested shoreline visible across the river and mountains now framing the left side of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush summer meadow that gradually opens into a wide river valley and a sandy beach. It begins with Geralt walking alongside a narrow stream surrounded by tall grass and colorful wildflowers, with distant snow-capped mountains framing the horizon. As he crosses a shallow rocky section of the stream, the enclosed meadow expands into a broader valley where a dirt path appears and the mountains become more prominent in the center of the view. The scene then shifts as the tall grass gives way to a sandy shore, following Geralt as he walks along the beach and wades into the clear shallow water. Finally, the perspective settles on the wide river with a forested shoreline across the water and the mountains framing the left side of the landscape.
